title: Automation foundation: types, Action, ActionRunner
description:
Implement the internal/automation package foundation from docs/design-triggers-schedules.md.

Sections: Data Model, ActionRunner

Key deliverables:
- Trigger struct, Schedule struct, Action struct, ConditionMode enum
- ActionRunner with exec and message action dispatch
- Exec concurrency control: semaphore (max 3), drop-on-saturate, 60s timeout with SIGKILL
- Condition evaluation helper (sh -c with env vars, exit code check)
- Environment variable injection (base vars + state vars + event vars + identity vars)
- Unit tests for ActionRunner (success, failure, async, env vars, concurrency limit, timeout)

References:
- Plan: docs/design-triggers-schedules.md §Data Model, §ActionRunner, §Environment Variables
